Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREURO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
